benchmark_version_policy: stable_main_release: plain X.Y.0 versions only; excludes prerelease, platform/system variants, and timestamp/internal builds

benchmark_exclusions.0.54.0: Deprecated npm package has bad MUSL binaries on Linux; Docker build installs it but codex --version fails because the x86_64-unknown-linux-musl vendor binary is missing (ENOENT).
